overall.description: First-person walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city street at night, featuring futuristic billboards, passing vehicles, and atmospheric haze. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing the player character walking along a sidewalk beside a multi-lane road with towering mega-structures visible through the smog.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit cyberpunk street with overhead billboards

events.description: pedestrian in dark clothing walks past camera heading in opposite direction
billboard transitions from data_terms to shouts_desire advertisement

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing under neon billboards and observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction wearing dark jacket and light pants

entered.detail: tall illuminated skyscraper with multiple horizontal light bands visible through haze
concrete traffic barrier with diagonal cyan neon strip lights
dark metal building wall with horizontal yellow neon light strips
overhead digital billboard displaying DATA TERMS in white text
overhead billboard with text LIFE IS TOO SHORT TO BE SLOW

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow cyberpunk street with the mega-tower looming ahead through the haze. The left side features a cyan-lit traffic barrier while the right wall glows with yellow neon strips. Overhead billboards display advertisements, and a pedestrian passes by in the opposite direction around the 4-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street section with large red advertisements

events.description: large blue box truck drives past on the road to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the street curves gently to the right, approaching large red billboards

notable_agents.action: large blue truck driving past on the multi-lane road
distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in same direction

entered.detail: large pink billboard with SHOUTS DESIRE text and spider-like graphic
bright red billboard displaying TOTAL RECALL 93 with eye graphic

segments.scene_description: The street curves gently to the right as large red billboards dominate the overhead space. A blue truck passes on the road to the left, and the mega-tower remains visible in the distance. The pedestrian ahead continues walking away, gradually getting closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: straight street with golden billboard and atmospheric smoke

events.description: billboard changes to golden 35V6 advertisement with female portrait
yellow sports car speeds past on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily as the street straightens, passing under the golden billboard with vehicles passing by

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding past quickly on the road

entered.detail: golden illuminated billboard displaying 35V6 with female portrait and foreign text
dark smoke rising from behind the left barrier into the night sky

segments.scene_description: The street straightens out with a prominent golden billboard overhead displaying 35V6. A yellow sports car speeds past on the left. Dark smoke rises in the distance on the left side, and the right wall continues its yellow neon strip lighting. No pedestrians are visible in this section.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with Arasaka corporate billboard and heavy traffic

events.description: billboard changes to Arasaka corporate advertisement with red logo
dark sedan with headlights on passes by on the road

agents.ego_description: continuing the walk as the Arasaka billboard becomes prominent, with increased vehicle traffic passing by

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving past with red tail lights visible

entered.detail: large black billboard with red Arasaka logo and white text reading WE ARASAKA HAVE YOU

segments.scene_description: The final section features the Arasaka corporate billboard dominating the overhead space with its distinctive red logo. Several vehicles including a dark sedan pass by on the wet road. The mega-tower remains visible ahead through the haze, and smoke continues to rise on the left side of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey down a neon-drenched cyberpunk street that leads toward a looming mega-tower shrouded in haze. It begins along a narrow corridor flanked by cyan traffic barriers and yellow neon strips, passing a lone pedestrian under glowing overhead advertisements. As the street curves gently to the right, the lighting shifts toward dominant red billboards while a blue truck glides past on the adjacent road. The path then straightens under a prominent golden billboard as a yellow sports car speeds by, revealing plumes of dark smoke rising in the distance. Finally, the camera advances toward the Arasaka corporate logo on a massive red billboard, passing several vehicles on the wet pavement while the distant tower remains fixed through the atmospheric smog.
